# Support

Thanks for using Ryn. Here is where to get help.

## Documentation

Start with the docs, which cover most common questions:

- [README](../README.md): overview, install, and quick start
- [Getting Started](../docs/getting-started.md): full walkthrough from install to bundle
- [Architecture](../docs/architecture.md): the IPC pipeline, threading model, and security internals
- [Plugin Authoring](../docs/plugin-authoring.md): writing Ryn plugins
- [Vite Integration](../docs/vite-integration.md): using Vite and TypeScript with Ryn

## Bugs and feature requests

Use the [GitHub issue tracker](https://github.com/Yupmoh/Ryn/issues):

- Found a bug? Open a [bug report](https://github.com/Yupmoh/Ryn/issues/new?template=bug_report.yml).
- Have an idea? Open a [feature request](https://github.com/Yupmoh/Ryn/issues/new?template=feature_request.yml).

Before opening an issue, search the [existing issues](https://github.com/Yupmoh/Ryn/issues?q=is%3Aissue) to see if it has already been reported.

## Security

Do not report security vulnerabilities through public issues. See [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) for how to report them privately.
